component.name: QPDF GUI
component.summary: Cross-platform desktop PDF toolbox powered by qpdf

description.p: A cross-platform desktop application for PDF manipulation powered by qpdf. Supports extract, merge, split, rotate, delete, encrypt, decrypt, optimize, linearize, and batch operations.

ul.li: Extract, merge, split, rotate, and delete PDF pages
Encrypt and decrypt PDFs with AES-256
Optimize PDF file size with quality presets
Linearize PDFs for fast web viewing

description.p: AppImage ARM64, Flatpak, AUR, and Snap support.
Desktop notifications, bundled qpdf, Arabic localization.
